calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura/KTom; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And Accompanying Papers
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Geoffrey Murry, Esq. of Hendricks Murry, (415-986-9800), for Byron W. Hancock, Defendant and moving party.
Ronald D. Schivo, Esq. of U&L, (415-357-0600), for Kevin Lee, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Reporter Marlene Puaoi, CSR #7370, (415-382-6187).

Court hears the arguments on the motion to expunge lis pendens and oral motion of defendant re attorney's fees and costs in conjunction with this motion.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: Defendant's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And Accompanying Papers and Attorney's Fees and Costs are taken under submission. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported.
